canRename.description: Function to determine if a node can be renamed.

defaultCheckedValue.description: The initial checked node values when uncontrolled.

defaultExpandedValue.description: The initial expanded node values when uncontrolled.

defaultFocusedValue.description: The initial focused node value when uncontrolled.

defaultSelectedValue.description: The initial selected node values when uncontrolled.

expandOnClick.description: Whether clicking on a branch should open it.

id.description: The unique identifier of the tree view.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; tree: string; label: string; node: (value: string) => string }>
ids.description: The ids of the tree view elements. Useful for composition.

loadChildren.description: Function to load children for a node asynchronously.

loadChildrenComplete.description: Emits when async children load successfully.

loadChildrenError.description: Emits when async children fail to load.

scrollToIndexFn.description: Function to scroll to a specific visible node index.

translations.description: The localized strings for the tree view.

typeahead.description: Whether the tree supports typeahead search.

value.description: The tree view machine returned by useTreeView().

indexPath.description: The index path of the tree node.
